message:
chore(a11y): add aria attributes for screen reader support

SpotlightSearch:
- Add role="group" and aria-label to category filter section
- Add aria-pressed to category toggle buttons
- Add aria-hidden to decorative icons
- Add aria-label to interactive elements

BasketSidebar:
- Add aria-label to close and remove buttons
- Add aria-hidden to decorative icons
- Fix inconsistent indentation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
